title: Video by karin.avi
description:
You don’t have to be an athlete to move like one.

Most adults simply don’t have access
to coordination and agility work anymore, 
often because playful activities doesn’t fit the image
of “respectable” adult training in a commercial gym.

But these qualities shouldn’t be overlooked.
Because training isn’t just about your muscles, moving well starts with your brain.

Enjoy,
Karin. 

Upcoming workshop 
Bologna, Italy 

May 16-17

All levels are welcome!
Link in bio

#movement #coordination
